title: Hiring Store Manager at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services:
Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services!
